m: SRH VS RR - TATA IPL 2026 ELIMINATOR
d: Witness a high-stakes Eliminator clash as Rajasthan Royals take on Sunrisers Hyderabad in a do-or-die battle for survival in IPL 2026. With a place in Qualifier 2 and the race to Sundays IPL Final on the line, expect explosive strokeplay, intense playoff pressure, and a fierce knockout battle between Pat Cummins SRH and Riyan Parags Rajasthan Royals. Experience the electrifying atmosphere and live match action on the big screen at PVR INOX!
